query:
SELECT 'reservations' as tbl, id, customer_name, customer_email, created_at FROM reservations WHERE customer_name LIKE '%Carlos%' OR customer_name LIKE '%Calin%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'clients' as tbl, id, name, email, created_at FROM clients WHERE name LIKE '%Carlos%' OR name LIKE '%Calin%'
ORDER BY created_at DESC;
